items.description: Release of parking control tower updates covering parking configuration & policy management, payment channel orchestration, access, permit & LPR control, and enforcement & compliance workflows across Operator Control Console, Parking KPI Cockpit, and Parking Operations API.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve paid session conversion rate through more consistent policy and payment execution.
Improve barrier queue time through cleaner access-control and permit validation flows.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve parking platform ARR by strengthening the operational-control proposition for existing parking accounts.

productBricks.change: Released reusable tariff and permit-control patterns.
Released more consistent cross-channel payment controls.
Released better permit and LPR event handling.
Released structured parking-compliance workflows and evidence views.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed control-tower workflow updates in Operator Control Console.
Deployed cross-channel performance visibility in Parking KPI Cockpit.
Deployed rule-consistent behaviors in Parking Operations API.

items.description: Release of transit open-payment reliability improvements covering transit fare & open payment engine, device & validator management, transit operations telemetry, and settlement, ledger & revenue reconciliation across Transit Operations Console, Validator and Driver Device Estate, and Transit Revenue Board.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve tap success rate through stronger validator-state control and failure handling.
Improve fare capture rate through cleaner exception and reconciliation workflows.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve processed payment volume by reducing friction in live open-payment operations.

productBricks.change: Released more resilient tap and fare-processing behaviors.
Released stronger field-device visibility and rollout controls.
Released payment and device health telemetry updates.
Released transport-payment reconciliation and exception-flow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed exception-handling updates in Transit Operations Console.
Deployed validator reliability improvements across the device estate.
Deployed transit payment-health visibility in Transit Revenue Board.

items.description: Release of partner launch and automotive-integration improvements covering partner API, sandbox & certification, market catalog & operator rules, partner analytics & revenue reporting, and automotive & in-car data services across Partner APIs and SDKs, Partner Workspace, and Partner Performance Board.

customerKPIs.kpi: Time to launch a new market
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve time to launch a new market through clearer certification and market-readiness workflows.
Improve transaction success rate through stronger rule clarity and partner diagnostics.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve ecosystem gross profit by enabling faster partner scale and better attach reporting.

productBricks.change: Released reusable certification and market-onboarding controls.
Released improved market and operator rule transparency.
Released richer partner performance and settlement reporting.
Released stronger connected-car parking and mobility service patterns.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed reusable integration and launch flows in Partner APIs and SDKs.
Deployed market-readiness and launch guidance in Partner Workspace.
Deployed commercial and operational visibility in Partner Performance Board.
